title: Order No. 1 of 2017 on Bahrain Broadband Internet Safety and Licence Breaches
summary: Enforces obligations under Articles 18, 53, 55 and 78 of the Telecommunications Law and internet safety regulation obligations.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: Order on Bahrain Broadband breach of internet safety and licence obligations.
